induction_input: The report the editor the assistant the intern consulted revised approved disappeared

induced_prompt_raw: Generate sentences with four nested (triply center-embedded) object-relative clauses containing four nouns followed by four corresponding verbs (e.g., "The [Noun1] the [Noun2] the [Noun3] the [Noun4] [Verb4] [Verb3] [Verb2] [Verb1]"). Avoid having only three nouns and three verbs.
